title: Al-Rashid's (Free) Wives Who Were Endowed with Substantial Dowries (al-mahdir
description: with Substantial Dowries [al-maha'irJ It is said that he married Zubaydah, that is, Umm Ja'far bt. Ja'far b. al-Manger, and consummated the marriage with her (a'rasa biha, literally "he had her conducted to him in marriage ") in the year 165 (781 -2) during al-Mahdi's caliphate, at Baghdad and in the residence of Muhammad b. Sulayman. She subsequently (i.e., after al-Rashid's death) went to live with al-'Abbasah and then with alMu'tagim billah.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
